zh.Raby Castle, Durham, England: 英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Neville於1176年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯時，她的父親Geoffrey de Neville32歲，母親Emma de Bulmer22歲。她於1213年與Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby在英國英格蘭達勒姆布朗加斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1254年5月15日在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Neville于1176年出生在英国英格兰達勒姆布朗加斯时，她的父亲Geoffrey de Neville32岁，母亲Emma de Bulmer22岁。她于1213年与Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby在英国英格兰達勒姆布朗加斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1254年5月15日在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比 卡素享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isobel
meanings: Variant spelling of   Isabel .

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Neville was born in 1176, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom, her father, Geoffrey de Neville, was 32 and her mother, Emma de Bulmer, was 22. She married Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby in 1213, in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 15 May 1254, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 78, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Neville est née en 1176, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Geoffrey de Neville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Emma de Bulmer, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby en 1213, à Brancepeth, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 15 mai 1254, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Neville 1176 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey de Neville 32 und ihre Mutter Emma de Bulmer 22. Sie hat 1213 in Brancepeth, Durham, England, United Kingdom Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 15. Mai 1254 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby nel 1213, nel Brancepeth, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Nevilleが1176年にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Nevilleは32歳，母Emma de Bulmerは22歳であった。1213年にイギリスイギリスダルハムブランセペスでRobert FitzMaldred Lord of Rabyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1254年5月15日にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Neville(이)가 1176년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey de Neville(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Bulmer(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1213년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 브랜스프스에서 Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 5월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Neville nasceu em 1176, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Geoffrey de Neville, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Bulmer, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby em 1213, em Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 15 de maio de 1254, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Neville родилась в 1176 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Geoffrey de Neville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Bulmer, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby в 1213 г. в местности брансепет, дурам, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 15 мая 1254 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Robert FitzMaldred Lord of Raby en 1213, en Brancepeth, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 15 de mayo de 1254, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
